issues.title: [P2] Implement workflow pause/resume/cancel functionality
issues.description: Workflow control endpoints are incomplete - they return status updates but don't actually pause/resume execution.
acceptance_criteria: POST pause endpoint actually stops workflow execution
POST resume endpoint resumes from paused state
State persisted to PostgreSQL and restored on service restart

issues.title: [P2] Complete GDPR data subject rights workflow
issues.description: GDPR requests not fully processed - missing database storage, email verification, and processing workflow.
acceptance_criteria: GDPR requests stored with verification status
Data export returns user data in standard format

issues.title: [P2] Add query performance monitoring decorator
issues.description: No performance monitoring on database queries - we're blind to slow queries in production.
acceptance_criteria: Query timing included in error logs
Performance metrics available in admin dashboard

issues.title: [P2] Execute Phase 1C error handling uniformity across 68 service files
issues.description: Inconsistent exception handling across service layer - some use HTTPException, others use generic Exception. Strategy documented in PHASE_1C_COMPLETE_IMPLEMENTATION.md, ready for execution.
acceptance_criteria: All service errors have proper status codes
All errors include request context for debugging

issues.title: [P3] Fix 612 Pyright type annotation errors
issues.description: Missing type annotations on public API functions, generic Dict instead of Dict[str, Any], untyped parameters reduce type safety.

issues.title: [P3] Expand E2E test suite (Playwright)
issues.description: E2E framework in place but needs comprehensive coverage for critical workflows.

issues.title: [P3] Refactor monolithic services
issues.description: Split unified_orchestrator.py (1,146 lines) and workflow_execution_adapter.py (726 lines) into smaller, focused services.

issues.title: [P3] Fix intermittent integration test failures
issues.description: Some integration tests marked as slow with intermittent failures due to async timing issues.
acceptance_criteria: Clear test markers for slow tests

issues.title: [P3] Add rate limiting middleware
issues.description: Security gap - no rate limiting on public endpoints leaves system vulnerable to DoS attacks.

issues.title: [P3] Integrate webhook validation
issues.description: Webhook validation code exists in middleware but not connected to routes - security gap for webhook spoofing.
acceptance_criteria: Webhook validation active on all endpoints

issues.title: [P3] Tune database connection pool
issues.description: Connection pool configured with default size=10, should be 50-100 for production workloads.
acceptance_criteria: Connection pool sized for expected load

issues.title: [P4] Evaluate public-site tooling (Next.js already modern)
issues.description: Oversight Hub uses CRA with CRACO (reverted from Vite for stability). Public Site uses Next.js (already modern). No action needed unless Next.js upgrade plan changes.

issues.title: [P4] Set up database performance benchmarking
issues.description: Create baseline benchmarks for critical database operations to detect regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Regression alerts when queries exceed targets

issues.title: [P4] Consolidate cost tracking services
issues.description: Cost tracking exists across multiple services but no unified reporting - need centralized cost attribution.
acceptance_criteria: Cost trends visible in admin dashboard

issues.title: [P4] Clean up markdown linting errors
issues.description: 533 markdown lint errors across docs - mostly formatting issues fixable with prettier.

issues.title: [P4] Set up performance benchmark suite
issues.description: Configure pytest-benchmark for tracking performance regressions over time.
acceptance_criteria: Results tracked and alerted on regression

issues.title: [P4] Enhance service discovery advanced routing
issues.description: Basic service registry exists - add dynamic weighting, load balancing, and failover strategies.
